1000646045.english: That point is difficult for me to cover because the buildings are so densely packed.
1000646045.korean: 그 지점은 건물이 간격이 빽빽해서 내가 엄호하기 힘들어.

1000646046.english: Still, wouldn't it be better if I kept Draco and the Bulgasari firmly in sight?
1000646046.korean: 그래도 내가 드라코랑 불가사리를 확실히 시야에 두는 게 낫지 않아?

1000646047.english: I will secure those locations. Miho, please carry out the operation according to the plan.
1000646047.korean: 해당 지점들은 본 작전관이 확보하겠습니다. 미호는 계획대로 작전을 수행해주세요.

1000646049.english: I'll continue. The estimated travel time from your current location to the destination, UOU Academy, is 1 hour.
1000646049.korean: 마저 진행할게요. 현 위치에서 목표 지점인 UOU학원까지의 이동 예상 시간은 1시간입니다.

1000646050.english: After securing the route to the target location, report arrival completion to HQ. Afterward, with support from other units, they search the interior of the academy.
1000646050.korean: 목표 지점까지 경로를 확보한 뒤, HQ에 도착 완료를 보고. 이후 다른 부대의 지원을 받아 학원 내부를 수색합니다.

1000646051.english: That's strange. Do you have any other questions?

1000646053.english: I heard you'll be staying here for a while, so you'll be able to rest with the commander after your mission is over.
1000646053.korean: 당분간 이곳에 머물 예정이라고 들었으니까, 임무가 끝나면 사령관님과 함께 쉴 수 있을 거예요.

1000646054.english: Hmm, what should I do with the commander this time...?

1000646055.english: I was going to ask if you wanted to watch the anime I got the other day. Do you want to watch it together?
1000646055.korean: 나는 저번에 구한 애니메이션 보자고 할 건데, 같이 볼래?

1000646056.english: It's going to be another hero thing, isn't it?

1000646058.english: I'll join you there. It'll be perfect for killing time, lying with my head in the commander's lap.
1000646058.korean: 나는 거기 합류~ 사령관 무릎 베고 누워서 시간 죽이기 딱이겠어.

1000646060.english: Heh heh, this intelligent Draco has everything planned out.
1000646060.korean: 큭큭, 이 인텔리한 드라코님에게는 다 생각이 있지.

1000646062.english: Tell me later if you remember.

1000646065.english: You thought the Queen would find out if you relied on alcohol? …That’s so like you. Simple, one-dimensional, childish… and yet, I can’t stop thinking about it to the point I want to kill you.&n…What are you doing? You said we’d have a drink. I’ll listen, so do whatever you want.&n…Watching you babble nonsense is, well, a little enjoyable.
1000646065.korean: 술기운을 빌리면 여왕이 알았다고 할 것 같았다고? ...진짜 너다운 생각이네. 단순하고, 일차원적이고, 유치한데다가...&n죽여버리고 싶을 정도로, 자꾸 생각나. ...뭐하고 있어? 술 한 잔 하자며. 들어는 줄테니까 하고 싶은 대로 해 봐.&n…...네가 헛소리를 늘어놓는 걸 보는 건 조금, 즐거우니까.

1000646070.english: Here's a donut, and here's a donut. Hero, please respond.
1000646070.korean: 여기는 도넛, 여기는 도넛. 히어로는 응답 바람.

1000646071.english: Hero reception is good. Dragon, is the dragon okay?
1000646071.korean: 히어로 수신 양호. 드래곤, 드래곤 양호한가?

1000646076.english: I'll let you know if I see anything.

1000646077.english: Chocolate Fox, Chocolate Fox. This is Donut, can you hear me?
1000646077.korean: 초코 폭스, 초코 폭스. 여기는 도넛, 수신 양호한가?

1000646078.english: This is Chocolate Fox, signal is good.

1000646079.english: Is it okay if I borrow the pack later?

1000646080.english: It's good. I'll lend you a good one.

1000646081.english: Thank you. So, is your relationship with the commander going well?

1000646083.english: Is the belly fat gained from eating chocolate okay?

1000646085.english: We will soon be entering the area where the Ironblood signal was detected. Let's focus.
1000646085.korean: 곧 철충 신호가 감지된 구역에 진입합니다. 집중하도록 하죠.

1000646088.english: I will also move to the next point.

1000646091.english: Announced from the donut. An unidentified survivor is detected in a building with a front billboard. Can the hero confirm this?
1000646091.korean: 도넛에서 알린다. 전방 전광판이 달린 건물에서 미식별 생존자가 감지되는데 히어로는 확인이 가능한가?

1000646092.english: The signal is not detectable by the receiver or visually.

1000646093.english: Additionally, an Metal Parasite has been detected 5 blocks to the left, so please be careful. That's all.
1000646093.korean: 추가로 좌측 5블록 거리에 철충이 감지되니 주의하도록. 이상.

1000646094.english: Okay. I'll check it myself. Donut out.

1000646095.english: That's strange. If there were any survivors, they would have heard our broadcast signal.

1000646096.english: Is that guy living without radio equipment?

1000646097.english: He's a shy one, isn't he? If you'd seen the power of this genius, maybe you would.
1000646097.korean: 수줍음이 많은 녀석이구나. 이 천재님의 힘을 봤다면 그럴 수도 있지.

1000646098.english: Oh, really? What kind of power does our genius have?
1000646098.korean: 오호, 그래? 우리 천재님은 어떤 힘을 가지고 있는데?

1000646099.english: Before, it was 'Knowledge is power.' I heard that. Because I am knowledgeable and therefore strong, I can withstand the attacks of the Metal Parasite Beasts!
1000646099.korean: 전에 '아는 것이 힘이다.'라고 들었어. 지식이 많은 나는 강하기 때문에 철충들의 공격도 버틸 수 있는 거야!

1000646100.english: Oh, I see~ Then show me the power of the genius.
1000646100.korean: 아, 그러셨구나~ 그럼 천재님의 힘을 보여달라구.

1000646103.english: Hey, survivor! We are the resistance under the command of the human!
1000646103.korean: 거기, 생존자! 우리는 인간님 휘하의 저항군이야!

1000646104.english: You can come out now! We'll protect you!

1000646105.english: Don't be afraid, you can come out now.

1000646108.english: Approaching unidentified survivors. However, they are putting up a smokescreen.
1000646108.korean: 미식별 생존자에게 접근 중입니다. 다만, 연막을 치고 있습니다.

1000646109.english: Stop approaching and back away. I'll go.
1000646109.korean: 더 이상 접근하지 말고 물러나세요. 제가 가죠.

1000646114.english: ... You, what kind of scream did you make?

1000646119.english: That guy, what exactly is he...?

1000646120.english: What? You guys don't know me, do you?
1000646120.korean: 뭐야. 너희들 설마, 나를 모르는 거야?

1000646121.english: That's strange. Didn't I bother you guys so much?

1000646122.english: Hey. Are you perhaps pretending not to know me too?

1000646123.english: ...You must be one of the survivors of the Destruction War.

1000646124.english: We don't know you. Stop your attack and surrender.
1000646124.korean: 저희는 당신을 모릅니다. 공격 행위를 멈추고 투항하세요.

1000646126.english: Ahahaha! Okay, I really like it!

1000646127.english: Yeah, I can feel that excitement again from when we first met...
1000646127.korean: 그래, 처음 만났을 때의 그 설렘을 다시 느껴볼 수…

1000646130.english: Chocolate Fox! Hero! Report your current location!
1000646130.korean: 초코 폭스! 히어로! 현 위치 보고하세요!

1000646139.english: What? It's too bland, isn't it? You guys don't even carry jammers or anything like that?
1000646139.korean: 뭐야. 너무 싱거운데? 너희들은 재머같은 것도 안 들고 다니는 거야?

1000646140.english: How peacefully did you live that you're like that?

1000646144.english: Hmm... I wonder why I'm doing this?

1000646145.english: Because they lost their family a long time ago because of the Mongoose team?
1000646145.korean: 먼 옛날에 몽구스 팀 때문에 가족을 잃어서?

1000646146.english: Or perhaps living while being subjected to all sorts of terrible experiments?
1000646146.korean: 아니면 온갖 끔찍한 실험을 당하며 살아서?

1000646147.english: Or perhaps... you thought you were doing the right thing, but were shocked by a completely different reality?
1000646147.korean: 그것도 아니면… 정의로운 일을 하는 줄 알았는데, 전혀 다른 현실에 충격을 받아서?

1000646150.english: That's impossible! I just want to kill you!
1000646150.korean: 그럴 리가 있나! 난 그냥 너를 죽이고 싶을 뿐이라고!

1000646152.english: That's not possible. It's been so long since we've met!
1000646152.korean: 그럴 수는 없지. 얼마 만에 만났는데~

1000646153.english: Okay. Shall we have a little more fun?

1000646155.english: Alright, let's hear the scream quickly! Show me your distorted face!
1000646155.korean: 자, 빨리 비명을 들려줘! 네 일그러진 얼굴을 보여줘!

1000646158.english: I'll tear you all to shreds first...!

1000646161.english: Damn it, did it graze me...?

1000646164.english: Yes! Hey, Draco! Snap out of it!

1000646165.english: The enemy's combat ability is considerable. Let's retreat for now.
1000646165.korean: 적의 전투능력이 상당합니다. 일단 물러서도록 하죠.

1000646166.english: Miyo and I will keep them in check, so Pinto, you take on the Bulgasari and Draco.
1000646166.korean: 저와 미호가 견제할테니, 핀토는 불가사리와 드라코를-

1000646167.english: You don't need to do that.

1000646168.english: You know the saying, "divide and conquer," right?

1000646170.english: Hey, Draco! Get up quickly! The Metal Parasite are swarming in!
1000646170.korean: 야, 드라코! 어서 일어나! 철충들이 몰려온다고!

1000646172.english: The operations officer is broadcasting. I'll give you a safe route, so please retreat slowly!
1000646172.korean: 작전관이 전파합니다. 안전한 경로를 전달할테니, 천천히 물러나도록 하세요!

1000646173.english: Huh, is this all you could come up with?

1000646174.english: What are you going to do now? It's the same situation as before, isn't it?

1000646175.english: Hmph, at least I bought some time.

1000646177.english: You said HQ a little while ago, right?

1000646178.english: You guys have a base, huh? Where is it? Are there more of your team members there?
1000646178.korean: 너희는 본거지가 있구나? 어딨어? 거기엔 너희 팀이 더 있어?

1000646180.english: Hmm, you're not going to tell me? Then...

1000646181.english: Before reinforcements arrive, I'll have to take them all out.

1000646182.english: I can't even touch a single hair on my mom's head - ugh...
1000646182.korean: 엄마한테는 머리카락 하나 댈 수 없을- 윽…

1000646183.english: Back off. I'll take care of it.

1000646184.english: Hmm. That's a fresh reaction, isn't it?

1000646187.english: Yes, you! I've always been annoyed by you flying around like a fruit fly!
1000646187.korean: 그래, 너! 날파리처럼 날아다니는게 항상 짜증났다고!

1000646191.english: Mongoose team, transitioning to engagement plan R.

1000646192.english: Draco's absence will be covered by Bulgasari and Pinto!

1000646195.english: You guys... you're a little different from how I remember you.

1000646196.english: I don't know what the Mongoose team you remember was like, but we are currently part of the Orca Resistance.
1000646196.korean: 당신이 기억하는 몽구스 팀이 어땠는지는 모르겠습니다만, 지금의 저희는 오르카 저항군 소속.

1000646199.english: If you want me to surrender... you'll have to kill me a hundred times over...!
1000646199.korean: 날 투항시키려면… 나를 백 번은 죽여야될 걸…!

1000646202.english: Are you okay?! I told you to stay back!

1000646204.english: You seem to have some free time?

1000646206.english: I can't see! I'm going to move!

1000646209.english: I'm starting to get bored... How long are you going to play tag?
1000646209.korean: 슬슬 따분해지는데… 언제까지 술래잡기 하려고 그래?

1000646210.english: Yeah, we were just starting to get tired of it too.

1000646215.english: Is this the end? Just by freezing your feet?
1000646215.korean: 이걸로 끝났다고? 겨우 발을 얼린 걸로?

1000646218.english: Uh, he's... tearing off the ice...?!

1000646220.english: You'll regret not killing me now.
1000646220.korean: 지금 날 죽이지 않은 걸 후회하게 될 거야.

1000646221.english: Just like it was a long, long time ago...!

1000646222.english: I think I'll let them escape!

1000646225.english: Draco is injured, and we're also quite depleted.

1000646226.english: Beside, if we pursue too aggressively, Miho might get isolated.
1000646226.korean: 거기다 무리하게 추격했다간 미호가 고립될지도 모릅니다.

1000646235.english: Okay. Miho, please report on the situation.

1000646236.english: It's okay. I've almost run out of ammunition, but...

1000646237.english: Ah, just visually identified support units. We're approaching from the avenue east of the engagement position.
1000646237.korean: 아, 방금 지원부대를 육안으로 식별. 교전 위치 동쪽의 대로에서 접근중이에요.

1000646238.english: Please guide me to meeting point E. We'll head over right away too.
1000646238.korean: 합류 지점 E로 유도해주세요. 저희도 바로 이동할게요.

1000646239.english: Commander. We've joined up with the support unit.

1000646240.english: I wasn't seriously injured, but my equipment was damaged overall.
1000646240.korean: 크게 다치지는 않았지만, 전체적으로 장비가 손상되었습니다.

1000646242.english: - As soon as the communication was over, Lian, who had been waiting, spoke.
1000646242.korean: - 통신을 마치자, 대기하던 리앤이 말을 건넸다.

1000646243.english: How about the Mongoose team? Is there a problem?

1000646244.english: Okay. Then I'll wait until you come back.

1000646246.english: - I heard the story from the returning Mongoose team.

1000646247.english: - Unfamiliar appearance and outstanding combat ability.
1000646247.korean: - 처음 보는 인상착의에 뛰어난 전투 능력.

1000646248.english: - An attitude of obsession with the Mongoose team, especially HongRyeon, although the purpose is unknown.
1000646248.korean: - 목적을 알 수 없지만, 몽구스 팀, 그중에서도 홍련에게 집착하는 태도.

1000646249.english: - And... an appearance that resembles HongRyeon.

1000646251.english: Well, I don't have any guesses either.

1000646252.english: If I had any information, I could at least make a guess...

1000646253.english: - UOU Academy. Outwardly, it's an elite training academy, but in reality, it's said to be a hidden base for the 080 organization.
1000646253.korean: - UOU학원. 대외적으로는 엘리트 양성 학원이지만, 실상은 080기관의 기지가 숨겨져 있다고 한다.

1000646255.english: Fortunately, this place served as a kind of hub, exchanging information between organizations with the Pacific Ocean as its boundary.
1000646255.korean: 마침 이곳은 태평양을 경계로 기관 간의 정보를 교환하는, 일종의 허브 역할을 했어.

1000646256.english: That means there's a lot of information gathered there.

1000646257.english: Commander, I apologize, but... may our Mongoose team go again?
1000646257.korean: 사령관님 죄송합니다만… 저희 몽구스 팀이 다시 가도 되겠습니까?

1000646258.english: We've only lost equipment, so we can resume operations once repairs are complete. And...
1000646258.korean: 장비 손실만 있기에 수리를 마치면 작전 수행이 가능합니다. 그리고…

1000646259.english: What happened to me and that android. I would like to confirm.
1000646259.korean: 저와 그 바이오로이드에게 무슨 일이 있었는지. 확인하고 싶습니다.

1000646260.english: Thank you, Commander. Once maintenance is complete, I will conduct reconnaissance.
1000646260.korean: 사령관님 감사합니다. 정비를 마치면 정찰하도록 하겠습니다.

1000646261.english: - If I meet that guy again this time, there will be a hitch.
1000646261.korean: - 이번에도 그 녀석을 만나면 차질이 생긴다.

1000646262.english: - And it would be best to get out of the threat as quickly as possible, if you can.
1000646262.korean: - 그리고 가능하면 빨리 위협에서 벗어나는게 좋겠지.

1000646263.english: Reconnaissance hasn't been completed yet, are you okay with that?

1000646264.english: Yes. Then we'll depart once the investigation team is ready.

1000646265.english: - I'm wondering who would be good to include in the investigation team, but for now...
1000646265.korean: - 조사 인원으로 누가 좋을지 고민이 되는데, 일단은...

1000646266.english: Yeah. Just leave it to me.

1000646268.english: Instead, could you slow down a little?

1000646269.english: We'll let you know as soon as we're ready on our end too.

1000646270.english: Yes, I understand the mission is to work with the City Guard.
1000646270.korean: 네, 임무는 시티 가드 분들과 함께하는 것으로 알겠습니다.

1000646271.english: Are you referring to the 080 agency?

1000646272.english: - They say you should ask a pharmacist for medicine, so you should ask the 080 agency for matters related to the 080 agency.

1000646273.english: - And since Lianne is also involved with the 080 agency.

1000646274.english: We'll let you know as soon as we're ready on our end.

1000646275.english: Because we need to prepare on our side too.

1000646276.english: I've been resting while doing maintenance, and I have to leave without really resting properly, right?
1000646276.korean: 그동안 정비하면서 쉬고 있어, 제대로 쉬지도 못하고 가야 하잖아?

1000646279.english: Okay, I'll come by in a little while.

1000646281.english: The equipment seems to be working fine. And my physical condition isn't bad either.
1000646281.korean: 장비는 문제없는 것 같아. 몸 상태도 나쁘지 않고.

1000646287.english: It seems Draco was hurt by this incident.
1000646287.korean: 이번 일로 드라코가 상처받은 것 같아.

1000646288.english: Even while he was being treated, he kept getting lost in thought like that.
1000646288.korean: 치료받는 동안에도 계속 저렇게 생각에 잠기더라고.

1000646293.english: If you have any worries, tell me. I'll listen.

1000646296.english: That guy earlier... I tried to hold on, but I just couldn't.
1000646296.korean: 아까 그 녀석 말이야. 버텨보려고 했지만, 버틸 수가 없더라고.

1000646298.english: Among us, there's no one else who would do that beside you.
1000646298.korean: 우리 중에서는 너 말고 그럴 사람도 없고.

1000646300.english: You don't have to handle everything on your own. We're a team, aren't we?
1000646300.korean: 혼자서 다 감당할 필요는 없어. 우리는 한 팀이잖아.

1000646301.english: And what he doesn't have, you do.
1000646301.korean: 그리고 그 녀석한테는 없는 게 너한테는 있어.

1000646303.english: Yes, Draco has advantages that are incomparable to anyone else.
1000646303.korean: 응, 그 누구랑도 비교되지 않는 드라코만의 장점이.

1000646304.english: My own strengths... I don't know very well, haha. I see.
1000646304.korean: 나만의 장점... 잘은 모르겠지만, 크크. 그렇구나.

1000646305.english: Thank you. I'm feeling a little better.

1000646309.english: These people have come to help with the operation.

1000646312.english: This country is like my stage.

1000646313.english: It's been a while, so I'm looking forward to it!

1000646315.english: The three of you will accompany each other to investigate the UOU Academy.
1000646315.korean: 세분은 UOU학원을 조사하기 위해 동행할 겁니다.

1000646316.english: Normally, we would determine the route after reconnaissance, but since we don't have time now, we'll make the decision on the spot.
1000646316.korean: 원래는 선행 정찰 후에 기동로를 정해야 하지만, 지금은 여유가 없으니까 현장에서 판단하고 정합니다.

1000646317.english: Draco will lead the way to the destination, followed by Mr. Nikki, Ms. Lianne, Bulgasari, and Pinto in the middle, and then me, Ms. Shirayuri, and Miho in the back.
1000646317.korean: 목표 지점까지 드라코가 선두에 서고 니키씨, 리앤씨, 불가사리, 핀토가 중열에 저, 시라유리양, 미호가 후열에 서서 이동합니다.

1000646318.english: Door breaching within the branch should be handled by Bulgasari.
1000646318.korean: 지점 내의 도어 브리칭은 불가사리가 해주세요.

1000646319.english: What should we do in the meantime?

1000646320.english: You can support the battle until they arrive.

1000646321.english: The three of you, please gather information when you arrive.

1000646322.english: The Mongoose team has been protecting targets from danger.
1000646322.korean: 몽구스 팀은 그동안 위험 대상을 막습니다.

1000646323.english: If the border alert system is still in place, I can help you.
1000646323.korean: 경계경보 시스템이 남아있다면, 도움을 드릴 수 있어요.

1000646324.english: The problem is that the security AGS may be infected.
1000646324.korean: 문제는 경비 AGS가 감염되었을 가능성이 있다는 거죠.

1000646325.english: We will check the interior together.

1000646326.english: And if possible, it's better not to use the security AGS.
1000646326.korean: 그리고 가능하면 경비 AGS는 사용하지 않는 편이 낫겠네요.

1000646328.english: If there are no questions, we will depart as soon as we are ready.

1000646329.english: While I was moving, I thought I'd meet something.
1000646329.korean: 이동하는 중에, 뭐라도 만날 거라 생각했는데.

1000646330.english: Now that there's nothing, it feels a bit empty.

1000646331.english: Then we're good. Or did you actually want to fight?
1000646331.korean: 그러면 우리는 좋지~. 아니면 사실은 싸우고 싶었던 거야?

1000646332.english: No way, I just want to relax and eat some donuts in peace.
1000646332.korean: 설마, 나는 편하게 도넛이나 먹으면서 쉬고 싶은걸.

1000646333.english: Hehe, I'll eat chocolate next to you.

1000646334.english: Hmm. Both donuts and chocolate are delicious, aren't they?
1000646334.korean: 음음. 도넛이랑 초콜릿 둘 다 맛있지.

1000646335.english: Right? You know a thing or two!

1000646336.english: If you come back later, I'll give you a donut.

1000646338.english: Yeah, it's nothing else. I was going to ask about that guy.
1000646338.korean: 응, 다른 게 아니라. 그 녀석에 관해서 물어보려고.

1000646339.english: Is that guy such a difficult opponent?

1000646340.english: You can't predict their fighting style, and every action they take is threatening.
1000646340.korean: 전투 방식을 예측할 수 없고, 행동 하나하나가 위협적이지.

1000646341.english: They even throw bombs right in front of you. How could you do such a thing?
1000646341.korean: 바로 앞에서 폭탄을 던지기도 하고. 그런 짓을 어떻게 해.

1000646342.english: Well, that's a problem. It's best if we don't run into each other if possible.
1000646342.korean: 음, 그건 곤란한데. 가능하면 마주치지 않는 편이 좋겠어.

1000646343.english: Even so, if you research the data, you'll be able to find a way.
1000646343.korean: 그래도 자료를 조사하다 보면, 방법을 찾을 수 있을 거야.

1000646344.english: Hehe. Please take care of me.

1000646345.english: Okay. Just leave it to me.

1000646347.english: Didn't you say the entrance was in the president's office?

1000646348.english: Yes. I was in a place where there were people in high positions from other branches as well.
1000646348.korean: 네. 다른 지부에서도 높은 위치의 사람이 있는 곳에 있었어요.

1000646349.english: Usually, they belong to the 080 organization.

1000646350.english: The building is in better shape than I thought.

1000646351.english: And should I say the recording is lush?

1000646352.english: Because there's no one to take care of the garden. It just grew up on its own.
1000646352.korean: 정원을 관리해줄 인원이 없으니까. 자기 멋대로 자란 거지.

1000646353.english: It feels peaceful, so it's not bad at all~

1000646354.english: It's been a while since I've been to the academy, and it brings back old memories. Back then, it was Tomo.
1000646354.korean: 오랜만에 학원에 오니까, 옛날 생각나네. 그때는 토모였지만.

1000646355.english: Shirayuri was a hindrance in many ways, but she also helped.
1000646355.korean: 시라유리가 여러모로 방해도 하고 도움도 줬었는데.

1000646356.english: I'm a different individual from that Shirayuri.

1000646357.english: That's true, but she reminds me of the Shirayuri I know.
1000646357.korean: 그건 그렇지만, 내가 알고 있는 시라유리랑 닮아서 말이야.

1000646359.english: You know, like taking advantage of someone's weakness to manipulate them to your liking...
1000646359.korean: 뭐랄까, 남의 약점을 잡아서 입맛대로 조종한다던가...

1000646360.english: The fact that you get frustrated when you're caught off guard by an unexpected opponent?
1000646360.korean: 예상 못 한 상대에게 당하면 분해한다는 점?

1000646361.english: I will definitely live up to your expectations and also address your weaknesses.
1000646361.korean: 기대에 부응해서 반드시 당신의 약점도 잡아두도록 하죠.

1000646362.english: Ahaha, I'll be careful so that won't happen.

1000646363.english: Hey guys, let's stop and start moving. Now it's our 080 agency's turn to work.
1000646363.korean: 얘들아~ 그만하고 슬슬 움직이자. 이제 우리 080기관이 일할 차례야.

1000646365.english: If you go straight up this road, you'll find the main building.
1000646365.korean: 이 길로 쭉 올라가면, 본관이 있어요.

1000646366.english: The president's office is there, so the facilities must be there too.
1000646366.korean: 그곳에 총장실이 있으니 분명 시설도 그곳에 있을 거예요.

1000646367.english: There's probably a security AGS inside, right?

1000646368.english: I'm sure it will. Because they hated their secrets being revealed more than death.
1000646368.korean: 분명 그럴 거예요. 자신들의 비밀을 들키는 걸 죽는 것보다 싫어했으니까.

1000646369.english: Even after the Metal Parasite appeared, the security AGS would have been left behind.
1000646369.korean: 철충이 나타난 이후에도 경비 AGS는 남겨두었을 겁니다.

1000646370.korean: 음음, 역시 준비성 하나는 좋은 녀석들이네.

1000646371.english: Hmph. Thank you for the compliment.

1000646372.english: Ahaha, there's no need to be so grateful.

1000646373.english: I know that's not a compliment.

1000646374.english: Hmm... Just as I expected, it's similar to the Shirayuri I knew...
1000646374.korean: 으음... 역시 내가 알던 시라유리랑 비슷해...

1000646375.english: Please be sure to tell me in what ways they are similar.

1000646376.english: Hey. Shirayuri, you know a lot about the academy, right?
1000646376.korean: 있잖아. 시라유리는 학원에 대해 잘 알지?

1000646377.english: Yes. My goal is to work in an educational facility.
1000646377.korean: 네. 저는 교육시설에서 활동하는 게 목적이니까요.

1000646378.english: If I studied in a place like this, would I become much smarter too?
1000646378.korean: 나도 이런 곳에서 공부하면 많이 똑똑해질까?

1000646379.english: It depends on what Draco does.
1000646379.korean: 드라코 양이 어떻게 하냐에 따라 달라지겠죠.

1000646380.english: But why are you asking that?

1000646382.english: Draco! Where are you! It's a Metal Parasite!

1000646384.english: Shirayuri, let's talk again in a little while!

1000646385.english: Okay, I'm in the Chancellor's office, but where's the entrance to the base?
1000646385.korean: 일단 총장실에는 왔는데, 기지로 가는 입구는 어디 있지?

1000646386.english: They say if you knock, the door will open, so if I hit everything here and there, something will come out, right?
1000646386.korean: 두드리면 길이 열린다니까, 이곳저곳 다 때려보면 뭐라도 나오겠지?

1000646387.english: Don't do it. What if you accidentally touch it the wrong way?
1000646387.korean: 하지 마세요. 자칫하다가 잘못 건드리면 어떻게 하려고요.

1000646388.english: This is actually a pretty good method, you know?

1000646389.english: Just trust this older sister once.

1000646395.english: In the meantime, the Mongoose team will keep watch around us.
1000646395.korean: 그동안 몽구스 팀은 주변을 경계하고 있을게요.

1000646396.english: No, wait a minute, I've already found it.

1000646398.english: Since there didn't seem to be any walls where a secret space could be, I thought it would be on the floor.
1000646398.korean: 비밀 공간이 있을 법한 벽은 없으니까, 바닥에 있을 거라고 생각했지.

1000646399.english: If you lift up this carpet...

1000646400.english: Ta-da, the base entrance is right here!

1000646401.english: Then. You already found it, and you were just pretending earlier?
1000646401.korean: 그럼. 이미 찾으셨으면서, 아까 그러려고 했던 거에요?

1000646402.english: Sometimes you need to stretch your body too.

1000646406.english: So, should we just go in?

1000646407.english: First, it would be best to report to the commander.

1000646410.english: Shirayuri, about what we were talking about earlier...

1000646412.english: I read in a book before that knowledge is power.
1000646412.korean: 이전에 책에서 아는 것이 힘이라고 하더라고.

1000646413.english: If I study and become smarter, won't I become that much stronger?
1000646413.korean: 내가 공부해서 더 똑똑해지면 그만큼 강해지겠지?

1000646414.english: If I get stronger, I'll be able to withstand his attacks too, and...
1000646414.korean: 강해지면 그 녀석의 공격도 버틸 테고,

1000646415.english: Then our team won't be in danger, right?
1000646415.korean: 그럼 우리 팀이 위험해질 상황은 나오지 않겠지?

1000646417.english: As the shield, I'm supposed to take the enemy's attacks.
1000646417.korean: 방패인 내가, 적의 공격을 받아내야 하는데.

1000646418.english: If I can just hold on, everyone will be safe...

1000646420.english: Oh, really... I was wondering what you were thinking about, and it was that, huh?
1000646420.korean: 나참... 계속 무슨 생각을 하나 했더니 그런 거였어?

1000646421.english: Draco, just because your knowledge increases doesn't mean you automatically get stronger.
1000646421.korean: 드라코, 일단은 지식이 늘어난다고 해서 강해진다는 건 아니야.

1000646423.english: But no matter how strong you become, there are things you can't obtain.
1000646423.korean: 하지만 아무리 강해져도, 얻을 수 없는 건 있어.

1000646424.english: Didn't I tell you earlier? You have your own strengths.
1000646424.korean: 내가 아까 말했지? 너만의 장점이 있다고.

1000646426.english: Courage. No matter how strong you become, you can't gain courage.
1000646426.korean: 용기. 아무리 강해져도, 용기는 얻을 수 없지.

1000646427.english: You may not be enough yet, but you're a truly brave kid.
1000646427.korean: 너는 아직은 부족할지는 몰라도 정말 용감한 녀석이니까.

1000646428.english: As always, protect us with your usual strength, your greatest virtue.
1000646428.korean: 평소처럼 네 장점인 그 씩씩함으로 우리를 지켜줘.

1000646429.english: If you fall, we'll pick you up.
1000646429.korean: 네가 쓰러지면, 우리가 일으켜 줄 테니까.

1000646432.english: This brave Draco will always protect you!

1000646434.english: That's what happens when you work together for a long time.
1000646434.korean: 오랫동안 같이 일하다 보면 그렇게 되더라고.

1000646436.english: Why don't you try being nice to the other kids instead?
1000646436.korean: 그러지 말고 다른 애들한테 상냥하게 해보는 건 어때.

1000646438.english: Hmph, scared? We're just having a few words.
1000646438.korean: 후후, 무섭다뇨. 그저 대화 몇 마디만 할 뿐인걸요.

1000646439.english: Haha... I should make sure I don't have to talk to you...
1000646439.korean: 하하... 너와 대화할 일이 없도록 해야겠네...

1000646440.english: Hoo hoo hoo. That's the right idea.

1000646441.english: Whew~ It seems this place wasn't safe either.
1000646441.korean: 휘유~ 역시 이곳도 안전하지는 않았나 보네.

1000646442.english: Yeah, you're right. There are many signs of fighting left everyplace.
1000646442.korean: 그러게. 곳곳에 싸운 흔적이 많이 남아있어.

1000646443.english: It's a relief that the data storage room is still intact.

1000646444.english: The 080 agency values information more than life itself.

1000646445.english: So, at least the temporary power supply is kept in the data storage room.
1000646445.korean: 그래서 임시 전력만큼은 데이터 보관실에 남겨두고 있죠.

1000646446.english: Is there anything we can help you with?

1000646447.english: I appreciate the thought, but this is my specialty. Leave it to us.
1000646447.korean: 마음은 고맙지만, 이런 일은 전문이니까. 우리한테 맡겨줘.

1000646448.english: Then the Mongoose team will keep watch around the area.

1000646449.english: If you have something to deliver, please call me.

1000646450.english: Mr. Nikki, could you restore power to the base?
1000646450.korean: 니키 씨, 기지 전력을 복구해 줄 수 있을까요?

1000646451.english: That much is easy. What's wrong?
1000646451.korean: 그 정도는 쉽지. 뭐 때문에 그래?

1000646452.english: While hacking, I'll also try to understand the base's systems.

1000646453.english: Will two people be enough for the work?

1000646454.english: No problem. It takes time to get all the information, but right now, we just need to find the unknown Bioroid.
1000646454.korean: 문제없어요. 모든 정보를 얻는 데에는 시간이 걸리지만, 지금은 이름 모를 바이오로이드를 찾는 것뿐이니까요.

1000646457.english: Let's see... The main database password should be moderately unlocked...
1000646457.korean: 어디보자... 메인 데이터베이스 암호는 적당히 해제하고...

1000646458.english: Can you give me a tool to hack access permissions?

1000646459.english: Here. The data censorship system has been disabled.

1000646460.english: Thank you. Shall we start looking now?

1000646462.english: This is the last one... Okay, I'm done.

1000646464.english: Hey, look at this for a second.

1000646466.english: I found some information related to that guy.

1000646467.english: This is... That sounds like a bigger deal than I thought.

1000646471.english: Mission Briefing: Investigate recent terrorist acts targeting the rapidly increasing Total Leader forces.
1000646471.korean: 지령 내용 : 최근 들어 급증한 총수 세력을 겨냥한 테러 행위 조사.

1000646472.english: Investigation Content 1: Terrorist acts have sharply increased against forces related to Boss Angel.
1000646472.korean: 조사 내용 1 : 앙헬 총수와 관련된 세력에 테러 행위가 급증함.

1000646473.english: While investigating the terrorist act, an unidentified android with red hair (hereinafter referred to as R1) was captured.
1000646473.korean: 해당 테러 행위를 조사하던 중, 붉은색 머리카락의 신원 미상인 바이오로이드(이하 R1)를 포착함.

1000646474.english: R1 has also been found at other terrorist sites, and the connection between this R1 and terrorism is being investigated.
1000646474.korean: R1은 다른 테러 장소에서도 발견되었으며, 이 R1과 테러와의 연관성을 조사 중.

1000646475.english: Investigation Content 2: R1 has a similar appearance to our company's Crimson Lotus entities, but we have no record of producing R1.
1000646475.korean: 조사 내용 2 : R1은 자사의 홍련 개체와 유사한 외모를 가졌으나, 자사에서는 R1을 제작한 기록이 없음.

1000646476.english: In response, they suggested the possibility of the HongRyeon entity's genetic material leaking or the possibility of it being created by other factions within the company. However, since there have been no reported cases of the former, they focused on the possibility of the latter.
1000646476.korean: 이에 대해 홍련 개체의 유전자 유출과 자사 내의 타 세력이 제작할 가능성을 제시했으나, 전자의 경우 보고된 건이 없으므로 후자일 가능성에 초점을 맞춤.

1000646477.english: Investigation Content 3: Displays an aggressive attitude toward the counter-terrorism unit, particularly showing excessive anger and obsession with their Mongoose team, especially the Guren individual.
1000646477.korean: 조사 내용 3 : 대테러부대에 공격적인 태도를 보이며, 특히나 자사의 몽구스 팀, 그중에서도 홍련 개체에 과도한 분노와 집착을 보임.

1000646478.english: Investigation Conclusion: R1 objects were commonly found in recent terrorist attacks targeting the rapidly increasing leader factions.
1000646478.korean: 조사 결론 : 최근 급증한 총수 세력을 겨냥한 테러에는 공통으로 R1개체가 발견됨.

1000646479.english: However, the manufacturer of that object and whether a genetic leak occurred from Honglian have not been identified.
1000646479.korean: 하지만, 그 개체의 제작사와 홍련의 유전자 유출 발생 여부가 파악되지 않음.

1000646481.english: There's a connected document. This too-

1000646482.english: Power has been restored to the entire base. Restart all systems.
1000646482.korean: 기지 전체의 전력이 복구되었습니다. 모든 시스템을 재가동합니다.

1000646483.english: Oh, the power is back on.

1000646484.english: I'm back. Did it take a while?

1000646485.english: No. I was just sharing some related information. You've recovered other things too, haven't you?
1000646485.korean: 아냐. 지금 막 관련 정보를 공유하고 있었어. 다른 것들도 복구시켰구나?

1000646487.english: But, doesn't the security system also revive when all the systems are activated?
1000646487.korean: 그런데, 모든 시스템이 가동되면 경비 시스템도 부활하는 거 아닌가요?

1000646488.english: It's okay. My authentication authority is quite high, so if I do this...
1000646488.korean: 괜찮아. 내 인증 권한은 꽤 높은 편이니까, 이렇게 하면...

1000646489.english: Oh, it seems I don't have security system access unless I'm affiliated with the branch?
1000646489.korean: 이런, 지부 소속이 아니면 경비 시스템 권한이 없다는데?

1000646490.english: Warning, warning. An unidentified armed group has broken into the data storage room.
1000646490.korean: 경고, 경고. 신원 미상의 무장 단체가 데이터 보관실로 침입했습니다.

1000646491.english: Alert level Alpha issued, alert level Alpha issued. All forces, repel the invaders.
1000646491.korean: 경보 등급 알파 발령, 경보 등급 알파 발령. 모든 병력은 침입자를 저지하십시오.

1000646492.english: Warning, warning. Disarm and surrender immediately.
1000646492.korean: 경고, 경고. 지금 즉시 무장을 해제하고 투항하십시오.

1000646493.english: We're also affiliated with the 080 organization. I've come under the command of the Last Human.
1000646493.korean: 우리도 080기관 소속이야. 최후의 인간님 명령으로 왔어.

1000646494.english: Only personnel belonging to the current branch can issue commands to this AGS guard.
1000646494.korean: 현 지부 소속 인원만 본 경비 AGS에게 명령을 내릴 수 있습니다.

1000646495.english: This is your final warning. Immediately disarm and surrender.
1000646495.korean: 마지막 경고입니다. 즉시 무장을 해제하고 투항하십시오.

1000646496.english: Oh, come on. These guys have no flexibility at all.

1000646497.english: The guards are still swarming in. This is never going to end, is it?
1000646497.korean: 경비병이 계속 몰려오고 있어. 이거 끝이 없겠는데?

1000646498.english: Isn't there some kind of good solution?

1000646499.english: I'm trying, just wait a little bit.

1000646500.english: You do not have security-related permissions for that branch. Access is restricted.
1000646500.korean: 귀하는 해당 지부의 보안 관련 권한이 없습니다. 접근을 제한합니다.

1000646501.english: Hmm... The security is unnecessarily thorough.

1000646503.english: You can't even access it unless you have registered permissions...

1000646504.english: The best way to handle this is...

1000646505.english: A good whack will fix it!

1000646506.english: Security console - shock detected - system - shutdown...
1000646506.korean: 보안 콘솔에- 충격을 감- 시스템- 정...

1000646507.english: Security console destroyed. Security system. Force stop.
1000646507.korean: 보안 콘솔 파괴. 경비 시스템. 강제 중지.

1000646508.english: How is it? Sometimes, even machines get better with a little bit of a beating, you know?
1000646508.korean: 어때? 가끔은 기계도 몇 대 쳐주면 나아진다니까?

1000646510.english: Sigh... This is what a top agent is like...?

1000646511.english: Sometimes, thinking outside the box can lead to good results.
1000646511.korean: 가끔은 틀에 벗어난 행동이 좋은 결과를 만들기도 하는걸.

1000646512.english: Haha. If the results are good, that's all that matters. Anyway, how is everyone doing?
1000646512.korean: 하핫. 결과가 좋으면 괜찮은 거지. 그나저나 다들 상태는 어때?

1000646515.english: That's a relief. Oh, there's the Mongoose team coming.
1000646515.korean: 다행이네. 아, 저기 몽구스 팀 온다.

1000646516.english: Are you injured anywhere? The AGS that were blocking us have all stopped as well.
1000646516.korean: 다친 곳은 없으신가요? 저희를 막던 AGS도 모두 정지했습니다.

1000646517.english: It's okay. Was there anything going on outside?

1000646518.english: Yes, no threats have been detected.

1000646519.english: That's a relief. Based on the information we've gathered so far, we don't have enough on that guy.
1000646519.korean: 다행이네, 우선 지금까지 알아낸 정보로는 그 녀석에 대한 정보가 부족해.

1000646520.english: However, it's definitely dangerous and unusual enough that the Angel himself would give the order.
1000646520.korean: 하지만, 그 앙헬이 직접 명령할 정도로 위험하고 특이한 것은 확실해.

1000646521.english: Before we fight, I've opened the linked document, so let's check that first.
1000646521.korean: 싸우기 전에 연결된 문서를 열어두었으니, 그것부터 확인해보자.

1000646524.english: Mission Briefing: Investigate the Mariea Leoboros faction.
1000646524.korean: 지령 내용 : 마리아 리오보로스 세력 조사

1000646525.english: Investigation Content 1: While investigating the forces of Mariea Leoboros, the half-sister of the Patriarch, it was confirmed that they included forces that had opposed the Patriarch, including the Elder Council.
1000646525.korean: 조사 내용 1 : 총수의 이복누이인 마리아 리오보로스 세력을 조사하던 중, 장로회를 비롯한 총수에게 대적했던 세력이 포함됨을 확인함.

1000646526.english: Upon confirming the detailed composition of the personnel, it was found that they were composed of individuals who had opposed or attempted to oppose the total leader's forces, and there were indications that they were planning to do so.
1000646526.korean: 자세한 구성 인원을 확인한 결과, 총수 세력에 대항하거나 했던 인원들로 구성되었으며, 그러려는 정황을 포착함.

1000646527.english: Investigation Content 2: Mariea Leoboros has declared herself the Empress of the Leoboros family, and several unidentified Bioroids have been detected near her.
1000646527.korean: 조사 내용 2 : 마리아 리오보로스가 자신을 리오보로스 가문의 여제로 선언하며, 그녀의 곁에 신원 미상의 바이오로이드를 여러 개체를 포착함.

1000646528.english: Among those objects, I confirmed the R1 object recorded in Special Directive X1. Additionally, intelligence reports confirm that R1 was created based on Guren's genes and its individual name is JangHwa.
1000646528.korean: 해당 개체들 중에서 특수 지령 X1에 기록된 R1 개체를 확인함. 또한, 첩보 결과로 R1은 홍련의 유전자를 기반하여 제작되었으며, 개체명이 장화임을 확인함.

1000646529.english: Investigation Conclusion: When sumMariezing Special Directive X1 and the above investigation findings, it is speculated that the unidentified entities, including the boots, are the work of Mariea's forces.
1000646529.korean: 조사 결론 : 특수 지령 X1과 상기 조사 내용을 정리했을 때, 장화를 비롯한 신원 미상의 개체들은 마리아 세력의 소행으로 추측됨.

1000646530.english: Additionally, the terrorist acts described in X1 are speculated to be actions by the Mariea faction aimed at undermining the leader faction.
1000646530.korean: 또한, X1에 기술된 테러 행위는 마리아 세력이 총수 세력을 깎아내리고자 하는 행위로 추측됨.

1000646531.english: We have currently obtained the genetic information from the boots from an internal spy and it is being stored at the Yokohama branch.
1000646531.korean: 현재 내부 스파이로부터 장화의 유전자 정보 입수, 요코하마 지부에서 보관 중.

1000646532.english: Genetic analysis revealed significant similarity to HongRyeon. The Yokohama branch research team has determined that the boots were created based on HongRyeon's genes.
1000646532.korean: 유전자를 조사한 결과 홍련과 상당한 유사성을 확인. 요코하마 지부 연구팀은 장화가 홍련의 유전자를 토대로 만들어진 것으로 판단함.

1000646533.english: Gene information is stored for detailed further research.
1000646533.korean: 자세한 추가 연구를 위해 유전자 정보를 보관함.

1000646534.english: You've found a lot of information.

1000646537.english: It was made using Ms. HongRyeon's genes, but their personality seems completely different.
1000646537.korean: 홍련 씨의 유전자로 만들었는데, 성격은 전혀 다른 것 같군요.

1000646538.english: Just because genes are the same doesn't mean everything will be the same.
1000646538.korean: 유전자가 같다고 모든 게 같을 수는 없지.

1000646539.english: Sometimes unusual things come from ordinary individuals, right?
1000646539.korean: 간혹 평범한 개체에서 특이한 게 나오기도 하잖아.

1000646541.english: The reason for the aggressive behavior is...

1000646542.english: As of now, all we know is that the terrorist attack was carried out under the orders of a human named Mariea.
1000646542.korean: 현재로서는 마리아라는 인간의 명령으로 테러를 했다는 것뿐이야.

1000646543.english: You could say he started obsessing over dealing with the Mongoose team, who were getting in the way of that process.
1000646543.korean: 그 과정에서 방해되는 몽구스 팀을 처리하는 것에 집착하기 시작했다고 봐야겠지.

1000646544.english: But... I don't understand why you're showing hostility.

1000646545.english: Let me see if there's anything else...

1000646546.english: The database has been frozen due to the destruction of the security console. You need the authority of an agent registered at that branch.
1000646546.korean: 보안 콘솔 파괴로 인해 데이터베이스가 동결되었습니다. 해당 지부에 등록된 요원의 권한이 필요합니다.

1000646548.english: It seems someone disabled the security system by destroying the security console earlier.
1000646548.korean: 아까 누군가가 경비 시스템을 무력화시킨다고 보안 콘솔을 파괴해서 그런 것 같군요.

1000646549.english: Well, there was nothing we could do about it, right?

1000646550.english: But how do we extract information now?

1000646551.english: To unfreeze it, we need access permissions, but we don't have those.
1000646551.korean: 동결을 해제하려면 접근 권한이 필요한데, 저희에게는 권한이 없어요.

1000646552.english: If you need the authority of someone involved, you can find someone here.
1000646552.korean: 관계자의 권한이 필요하다면, 이곳의 관계자를 찾으면 돼.

1000646553.english: Where can I find the relevant personnel...? Oh!

1000646554.english: I'll look for a gene seed repository.

1000646555.english: Commander, we've located the secret base and restored power.

1000646556.english: However, the database froze during the process of disabling the security system.
1000646556.korean: 다만, 경비 시스템을 해제하는 과정에서 데이터베이스가 동결되었습니다.

1000646557.english: I need permission for this, so I'm looking for the gene seed repository first.
1000646557.korean: 이곳에 대한 권한이 필요해서 우선 유전자 씨앗 저장소를 찾아보고 있습니다.

1000646558.english: And I've heard that there's a lot of information, so it takes time to select and acquire it. Is support available?
1000646558.korean: 그리고 정보가 많아서 선별, 취득하는 데에 시간이 걸린다고 하는데, 지원이 가능할까요?

1000646559.english: - Before going to America, we need to finish all the preparations here.
1000646559.korean: - 아메리카로 가기 전에, 이곳에서 모든 준비를 마쳐야 한다.

1000646560.english: - Originally, I was going to use the port as a base, but now information is more important...
1000646560.korean: - 원래는 항구를 거점으로 삼으려고 했지만, 지금은 정보가 중요한데...

1000646561.english: - Rather than commuting back and forth from the Orca every day, it would be better to use the academy as a base this time.
1000646561.korean: - 매일 오르카 호에서 왕복하는 것보다는, 이참에 학원을 거점으로 삼는 게 좋겠지.

1000646562.english: Then what about the port base?
1000646562.korean: 그러면 항구 거점은 어떻게 하실 건가요?

1000646563.english: - I told HongRyeon that I was thinking of using the academy as a temporary base.
1000646563.korean: - 나는 홍련에게 학원을 임시 거점으로 삼을 생각을 말했다.

1000646564.english: That's a good idea. Shall we come and meet you at Orca Lake?
1000646564.korean: 좋은 생각이십니다. 저희가 오르카호까지 마중을 나갈까요?

1000646565.english: Yes, we will stay here and protect this place.

1000646566.english: - After finishing communication with HongRyeon, I told them about my plan to use the academy as a base.
1000646566.korean: - 홍련과의 통신을 마치고 학원을 거점으로 할 계획을 전했다.

1000646567.english: - The personnel immediately began preparing to deboard.

1000646569.english: Everyone, the main force is coming to the academy.

1000646570.english: In the meantime, let's scout around the academy and eliminate any potential dangers.
1000646570.korean: 그동안 학원 주변을 정찰하면서 위험 요소를 제거하도록 하죠.

1000646571.english: I think I should say it.

1000646572.english: Now? We're going to scout soon, but wouldn't it be better to do it a little later?
1000646572.korean: 지금? 곧 정찰하는데, 조금 있다가 하는 게 좋지 않을까?

1000646573.english: It's okay, it hasn't started yet. Or are you just going to keep watching?
1000646573.korean: 아직 시작 전이니까, 괜찮아. 아니면 계속 두고 볼 거야?

1000646575.english: Operations Officer, may I have a moment?

1000646577.english: You look tired. Is it because of that boot guy?
1000646577.korean: 기운이 없어 보입니다. 그 장화라는 녀석 때문입니까?

1000646578.english: ... I'm sorry. You were the operations officer, but you were thinking about something else.

1000646579.english: That's alright. It's just that I'm worried about the operations officer.

1000646581.english: I keep thinking about it. Why does JangHwa dislike me, and how did it come to be that way?
1000646581.korean: 계속 생각하게 돼요. 장화는 왜 저를 싫어하는지, 어쩌다가 그렇게 되었는지.

1000646582.english: However, it's not the operations officer's fault, is it?

1000646583.english: We've never even met the boots, so why are you doing this?
1000646583.korean: 저희는 장화를 만난 적도 없는데, 왜 그러는 거죠?

1000646584.english: Perhaps it's hatred for the entity known as Guren...
1000646584.korean: 아마도 홍련이라는 개체에 대한 증오심이라고 생각합니다만...

1000646585.english: As long as I am HongRyeon, that won't change so easily.
1000646585.korean: 제가 홍련인 이상, 쉽게 바뀌지는 않을 겁니다.

1000646586.english: So, what are you planning to do?

1000646587.english: I think it would be dangerous to just leave it as it is, but...

1000646588.english: I want to persuade them if possible.

1000646589.english: I think it will be difficult.

1000646590.english: It must be very difficult. Perhaps even conversation might be impossible.
1000646590.korean: 많이 힘들겠죠. 어쩌면 대화조차 불가능할 수도 있겠죠.

1000646591.english: However, I feel like I can't just leave that child alone.
1000646591.korean: 하지만, 그 아이를 내버려 둘 수 없다는 마음이 드네요.

1000646593.english: I understand your feelings well. Then we will join you as well.
1000646593.korean: 마음을 잘 알겠습니다. 그럼 저희도 함께하겠습니다.

1000646595.english: The operations officer also helped us a lot when we were having a hard time.
1000646595.korean: 작전관님도 저희가 힘들어할 때 많이 도와주셨으니까.

1000646598.english: The operations officer can't always bear the burden of everything.
1000646598.korean: 항상 작전관님이 모든 것을 부담하실 수는 없으니까.

1000646599.english: Sometimes, we hope you'll lean on us too.

1000646602.english: Let's find the boots. Let's find them and have a conversation.
1000646602.korean: 장화를 찾도록 하죠. 찾아서 이야기를 나눠봅시다.

1000646603.english: Hehe. I knew Mom would do that.

1000646604.english: But what are you going to do? If we go again like last time, we'll just end up fighting.
1000646604.korean: 그런데 어떻게 하실 거예요? 저번처럼 갔다가는 싸우기만 할 텐데.

1000646605.english: Let's decide after we meet with the commander first.
1000646605.korean: 우선 사령관님을 만난 후에 정하도록 하죠.

1000646606.english: We can't do it on our own. We'll need help from a lot of people.
1000646606.korean: 저희끼리는 힘들 거에요. 많은 분의 도움이 필요할 테고.

1000646607.english: As the commander, you'll give permission, right?

1000646610.english: First, we need to find that guy, right?

1000646611.english: Let's decide as soon as we join the commander.

1000646612.english: Shall we start moving? Let's tidy up the area, as the commander will be arriving.
1000646612.korean: 슬슬 이동할까요? 사령관님이 오실 테니 주변을 정리하도록 합시다.

1000646614.english: Is the commander here? You're early.

1000646615.english: Yeah. There were only Metal Parasite around, and I've taken care of them all.
1000646615.korean: 응. 주변에는 철충밖에 없었고, 다 정리했어.

1000646616.english: I think I'll be fine as long as I have some donuts to eat during my break.
1000646616.korean: 쉬는 동안 먹을 도넛만 있으면 좋을 것 같아.

1000646618.english: Aurora made chocolate donuts the other day, so let's ask her.
1000646618.korean: 저번에 아우로라가 초코 도넛을 만들어 주던데 부탁해보자.

1000646619.english: Min... What was it again? Anyway, it was a chocolate donut.

1000646621.english: ... Everyone, I am reporting to the commander.

1000646624.english: Angel Leoboros has a half-sister named María Leoboros, and
1000646624.korean: 앙헬 리오보로스에게는 마리아 리오보로스라는 배다른 누나가 있는데,

1000646625.english: It seems she was such a threat that you ordered a direct investigation into her.
1000646625.korean: 직접 그녀에 대해 조사 명령을 내릴 정도로 큰 위협이었던 것 같습니다.

1000646626.english: In reality, it is speculated that the Mariea faction carried out various operations against the Angel faction, and
1000646626.korean: 실제로 마리아 세력은 앙헬 세력에게 각종 공작을 벌인 것으로 추측되며,

1000646627.english: The entity that was attacking us, the entity known as Boots, appears to have been controlled by Mariea.
1000646627.korean: 저희를 공격하던 개체, 장화라는 개체는 마리아에 의해 움직인 것으로 보입니다.

1000646628.english: But why would they attack us?

1000646629.english: Well... They were targeting the operations officer from the start, not us. We can't know.
1000646629.korean: 글쎄. 애초부터 우리보다는 작전관님을 노렸으니까. 우리는 알 수 없지.

1000646630.english: This is the information obtained by the selection investigation team.

1000646631.english: - Mariea, Angel's half-sister, who threatens Angel.
1000646631.korean: - 앙헬을 위협하는 앙헬의 배다른 누나, 마리아.

1000646633.english: Also, due to the current database freeze, there is a delay in obtaining information.
1000646633.korean: 또한, 현재 데이터베이스의 동결로 인해, 정보 획득에 지연이 있습니다.

1000646634.english: - We can't just leave those boots attacking the Mongoose team like this...
1000646634.korean: - 몽구스 팀을 공격하는 장화를 이대로 방치할 수는 없는데...

1000646635.english: Commander. Our Mongoose team will handle it.

1000646637.english: I know it's dangerous. However, the boots seemed to be fixated on us.
1000646637.korean: 위험하다는 것은 알고 있습니다. 하지만 장화는 저희에게 집착하는 모습을 보였습니다.

1000646638.english: Even for a moment, I'd like to talk and understand why they're doing this. And...
1000646638.korean: 잠시라도 좋으니 대화를 해보고 왜 이런 짓을 하는지 알고 싶습니다. 그리고...

1000646639.english: It's my own selfishness that I can't leave that child alone.
1000646639.korean: 그 아이를 내버려 둘 수 없다는 제 욕심이에요.

1000646640.english: They said even the Mongoose team could barely hold him back, even with their combined efforts, right?
1000646640.korean: 몽구스 팀이 협동해도 겨우 발을 묶을 수 있었다면서?

1000646641.english: I understand how you feel, but we need to be absolutely prepared.

1000646642.english: Are you sure you'll be okay?

1000646643.english: - I also think the Mongoose team is in danger.
1000646643.korean: - 나도 몽구스 팀이 위험할 거로 생각한다.

1000646644.english: - HongRyeon also knows that fact, but still wants to do it herself.
1000646644.korean: - 홍련도 그 사실을 알면서도 직접 하기를 원한다.

1000646645.english: - I believe she can do it.
1000646645.korean: - 나는 그녀가 할 수 있다고 믿는다.

1000646647.english: - The mongoose team is dangerous to each other. I need help.
1000646647.korean: - 몽구스 팀끼리는 위험하다. 도와줄 병력이 필요해.

1000646649.english: If we have reinforcements, there's nothing to worry about. As long as the operation is solid, that's all that matters.
1000646649.korean: 지원군이 있다면, 문제가 될 건 없지. 작전만 확실하면 되겠어.

1000646650.english: Then. I have something to tell you.

1000646651.english: To unfreeze, it must be an object registered here, but...
1000646651.korean: 동결을 해제하려면 이곳에 등록된 개체여야 하는데,

1000646652.english: Fortunately, we found intact genes in some of the storage vaults.
1000646652.korean: 다행스럽게도 일부 저장고에서 온전한 유전자를 찾았어요.

1000646653.english: It's an entity called Ellie Quickhand, and to put it simply...

1000646654.english: You could summarize it as an explosive ordnance disposal expert.
1000646654.korean: 폭발물 해체 전문가 정도로 요약할 수 있겠네요.

1000646655.english: That will be a big help. I can interfere with electromagnetic waves to some extent, but I can't dismantle them.
1000646655.korean: 큰 도움이 되겠군. 나는 전자기파 방해 정도는 할 수 있어도, 해체는 할 수 없으니까.

1000646656.english: It would be difficult during combat, but perhaps you could remove bombs that were set up in advance.
1000646656.korean: 전투 중에는 무리겠지만, 미리 설치해둔 폭탄을 제거할 수도 있겠군요.

1000646657.english: The production facilities haven't frozen, so there's no problem. I'll start right away.
1000646657.korean: 제작 시설은 동결되지 않아서 문제는 없어요. 바로 시작할게요.

1000646660.english: Can we come for maintenance too?

1000646661.english: - HongRyeon, who thanked me, moves with the Mongoose team.
1000646661.korean: - 나에게 감사 인사를 건넨 홍련은 몽구스 팀과 함께 이동한다.

1000646663.english: - There's too little information right now.

1000646664.english: - I put my thoughts aside and moved on to what I needed to do.
1000646664.korean: - 나는 생각을 미뤄두고, 할 일을 하러 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000646665.english: To be continued in Part 2 of "The Rose Blooming on the Lotus Flower."

1000646666.english: Okay. Tell me the details when you get back.

1000646667.english: Fortunately, I wasn't seriously injured. I'll be back for now.
1000646667.korean: 다행히도 크게 다치지는 않았어. 일단은 돌아올 거야.

1000646668.english: Leanne, do you have anything that comes to mind?

1000646669.english: If we investigate the UOU Academy, something might come up...
1000646669.korean: UOU학원을 조사하면 뭐라도 나올 것 같은데...

1000646670.english: I'll have the investigation team selected for you. Spread the word.

1000646671.english: Okay. Let the Mongoose team handle the reconnaissance.
1000646671.korean: 알았어. 정찰은 몽구스 팀이 하도록 해.

1000646672.english: No, go with the investigation team.

1000646673.english: It's okay. I don't have any time this time.

1000646674.english: Leanne, would you join the investigation team?

1000646675.english: No. This time, let's go with the 080 agency.

1000646677.english: Okay. I'll land the main force.

1000646678.english: No. I'll go as soon as you're ready here.

1000646680.english: It's okay. HongRyeon, will you keep talking?

1000646681.english: First, let's find and subdue the boots.

1000646682.english: Okay. Let the Mongoose team do it. But there's a condition.
1000646682.korean: 알았어. 몽구스 팀이 하도록 해. 대신에 조건이 있어.

1000646683.english: For safety, bring support personnel too.

1000646684.english: That's a relief. Can you restore it right away?

1000646685.english: Take Nikki with you so it can be unlocked right away.
1000646685.korean: 니키도 같이 가서, 바로 해제하도록 해.

1000646686.english: Okay. I'll call you later, so be ready then.

1000646687.korean: 흐음, 눈치 챘구나? 하긴~ 그렇게 노골적으로 말해줬는데 못 알아들었으면 실망했을 거야.&n…농담이야. 나한테 소중한 추억을 만들어줘서, 나를... 사랑해줘서 정말로 고마워, 사령관.&n자, 그러면~ 자기야, 서약한 날 기념으로 맛있는 거라도 먹으러 가자. 헤헷, 전부터 꼭 이렇게 불러보고 싶었어.

1000646688.korean: 에엥- 주인님 얼굴이 잘 안보여요... 그래도, 정말 좋아하는 주인님의 목소리는&n들리니까 하치코는 괜찮아요. 하치코를... 정~말로 사랑해주신다는게 느껴지니까요!&n헤헷, 이제 서약했으니까 하치코, 날 수 있는 거죠?

1000646689.korean: 아, 주인님... 네, 정말로 행복해요. 후후, 아뇨. 지금 이 순간만은 다른 건 아무것도 신경 쓰지 않기로&n했어요. 다른 분들의 시선도... 동생들도요. 왜냐하면... 주인님께서 저를, 주인공으로 만들어 주셨는걸요.&n사랑해요, 주인님. 이 세상에 있는 모든 사랑을 다 합친 것보다도 더.

1000646690.korean: 아, 저… 이런 상황은 대본에 나와있지 않아서 어떻게 해야 할지… 애, 애드립으로요?&n그, 그럼… 대, 대마왕님께는 죄송하지만, 저는 패배를 인정하겠습니다.&n그러니까, 저… 책임져 주실거죠…?

1000646691.korean: 내 마음... 전해진거네...? 헤헷, 진짜 꿈꾸는 것 같아. 나는 처음부터 그렇게 만들어...&n아냐, 이런 말은 안 할래. 있지. 나 사령관을 좋아해. 엄청엄청 좋아해.&n그리고 사령관도... 날, 좋아하는 거지...? 그럼 앞으로 각오해. 멍청이 사령관♡

1000646692.korean: 저는 복장에 따라 기분이 좌우되는 편이라고 말씀드렸었죠? 이런 옷을 입고,&n아름다운 갑판에서 사령관님과의 서약이라니… 앞으로는 사령관님을 제대로 보좌하지&n못할지도 모르겠어요. 계속… 오늘이 생각날 테니까요.

1000646693.korean: 이런 옷을 입힐 때부터 예상은 했다만, 결국 이렇게 되는 건가. 사령관도 잘 알겠지만 난 한낱 군인일 뿐.&n내가 줄 수 있는 건 충성과… 이 몸 정도다. 그래도 괜찮겠나? ...사랑? 하핫, 그건 당연하지 않나.&n본의 아니게 불안하게 해버린 모양이군. 나는 그대를 사랑한다. 그러니… 오늘 밤만은, 나를 좋을 대로 해도 좋다.

1000646694.korean: 활이 없으면 화살이 별 볼 일 없는 것처럼, 저 시라유리도 사령관님이 없으면 아무것도 아니게 돼요.&n제가 누군가를 이토록 흠모하고, 또... 곁에서 도움이 되고 싶었던 건 사령관님이 처음이에요.&n지금 이 순간도, 그리고 앞으로도... 사령관님의 총애를 받을 수 있도록 전력을 다할게요. 낮에도... 밤에도요...

1000646695.english: I suspected the Commander's feelings, but I never imagined he'd love me this much. As I thought, the Commander is someone unpredictable to me. An answer? You shouldn't have other thoughts during a mission~ but how could I say no? I like you too. I want to show you everything without hiding. Must you watch over all of it?
1000646695.korean: 사령관의 마음을 짐작하고는 있었지만, 이렇게나 날 사랑할 줄이야. 역시 사령관은 내 생각으로는&n예상할 수 없는 사람이야. 대답? 임무 중에는 다른 생각을 하면 안 되는데~ 싫을 리가 있겠어?&n나도 자기가 좋아. 숨기지 않고 내 모든 것을 보여주고 싶을 정도로. 자기가 다 지켜봐 줘야 해?

1000646696.english: This... are you giving this to me? I see... I finally understand. The Commander who always helps me, protects me, and loves me is my tall gentleman! I will become a lady who suits you, so please wait for me, okay? I really, really like you, sir.
1000646696.korean: 이건... 제게 주시는 건가요? 그렇구나... 이제야 알겠어요.&n항상 저를 도와주시고, 지켜주시고, 사랑해주시는 사령관님이 바로, 제 키다리 아저씨였어요!&n저, 아저씨에게 어울리는 숙녀가 될 테니까. 꼭 기다려주세요? 정말정말 좋아해요, 아저씨.

1000646697.english: So, you've brought the last human with you?
1000646697.korean: 그러니까, 여러분은 마지막 인간님을 모시고 오셨다고요?

1000646698.english: Yes, we were attacked by the boots while scouting the city.
1000646698.korean: 네, 우리는 도시를 정찰하던 중에 장화에게 공격을 받았습니다.

1000646699.english: So I came here to get some information about her.
1000646699.korean: 그래서 그녀에 관한 정보를 얻기 위해서 이곳을 방문했어요.

1000646700.english: However, a problem arose and the database was frozen.
1000646700.korean: 하지만 문제가 생겨서 데이터 베이스가 동결됐어.

1000646701.english: I need your help to undo that.
1000646701.korean: 그걸 해제하기 위해서는 네 도움이 필요해.

1000646702.english: That's easy. Leave it to me.

1000646703.english: Gene verification, branch affiliation confirmation, presentation of held permissions...
1000646703.korean: 유전자 확인, 소속 지부 확인, 보유 권한 제시…

1000646704.korean: 인증 완료, 데이터 베이스 동결을 해제합니다.

1000646705.english: The freeze has been lifted. However, there's an additional closed data storage room, but the opening and closing mechanism is broken, so it won't open.
1000646705.korean: 동결은 해제했어요. 그런데 추가로 폐쇄된 자료 보관실이 있는데, 거기는 개폐 장치가 고장이 나서 열리지 않네요.

1000646706.english: Data storage room? Why was it closed?

1000646707.english: According to the records, the AGS guarding the area was infected, so they had no choice but to close it down.
1000646707.korean: 기록에 따르면 그곳을 경비하던 AGS가 감염돼서 어쩔 수 없이 폐쇄했대요.

1000646708.english: Can we find out how many Iron Beasts there are?
1000646708.korean: 철충이 얼마나 있는지 알 수 있을까?

1000646709.english: I don't know the details, but... It doesn't seem like they deployed that many.
1000646709.korean: 자세한 건 알 수 없지만... 그렇게 많은 수를 배치한 것 같지는 않아요.

1000646710.english: First, let's investigate this area, and if necessary, we can check the security records.
1000646710.korean: 우선 이곳을 먼저 조사하고, 필요하면 경비 기록으로 파악해보죠.

1000646711.english: Then, shall we give it a thorough search?

1000646712.english: Is there anything I can help with?

1000646713.english: Ellie, let's play with your sisters over here.

1000646715.english: You can rest now. Do you want some chocolate?

1000646718.english: Because etiquette is important if you want to set an example as a nobleman.

1000646720.english: I was created in the name of the UOU Foundation for the education and protection of the children of high-ranking officials, and I was particularly favored by the nobility.
1000646720.korean: 저는 UOU 재단의 이름으로 고위층 자제분의 교육과 경호를 위해서 만들어졌는데, 특히 귀족 계층에서 선호하셨거든요.

1000646721.english: But what you just said, and the UOU Foundation in general, what exactly is its identity?
1000646721.korean: 그런데 방금 말한 것도 그렇고, UOU 재단은 대체 정체가 뭐야?

1000646722.english: The 080 agency wanted to approach wealthy individuals to obtain their information, and that's how the UOU Foundation was created.
1000646722.korean: 080 기관은 재력가의 정보를 얻기 위해 그들에게 접근하고자 했는데, 이때 만들어진 게 UOU 재단이에요.

1000646723.english: The UOU Foundation has had a significant impact on education worldwide and has established many educational institutions like this one.
1000646723.korean: UOU 재단은 전 세계의 교육 방면으로 큰 영향을 행사했고, 이곳과 같은 교육 시설을 많이 세웠어요.

1000646724.english: However, at that time, getting an education required a lot of money, and most of the students were children of the upper class, so...
1000646724.korean: 하지만 그 당시 교육을 받으려면 큰돈이 필요했고, 학생 대부분은 고위층의 자제였으니까…

1000646725.english: You would have been able to access it as intended.

1000646726.english: But Ellie was created in the name of the UOU Foundation, and that was all her mission was?
1000646726.korean: 그런데 엘리는 UOU 재단의 이름으로 만들어졌다는데, 맡은 임무는 그게 전부였어?

1000646727.english: That's the surface reason, but actually, they're an agent specializing in explosive disposal.
1000646727.korean: 표면적인 이유는 그렇지만, 사실은 폭발물 제거에 특화된 에이전트예요.

1000646728.english: Back then, terrorism targeted not only corporations but also wealthy individuals frequently.
1000646728.korean: 그때는 기업뿐만 아니라 재력가를 노린 테러가 빈번했으니까요.

1000646729.english: Normally, I would do my assigned work, but when the agency contacted me, I would go to dismantle explosives.
1000646729.korean: 평소에는 맡은 일을 하다가, 기관에서 연락이 오면 폭발물을 해체하러 갔어요.

1000646730.english: I can't see the equipment, so how did you disassemble it?
1000646730.korean: 장비가 보이지 않는데, 해체는 어떻게 했어?

1000646731.english: This isn't just mass-produced equipment; it's special gear modified for the mission.
1000646731.korean: 이건 단순한 양산이 아니라 임무를 위해 개조된 특별한 장비에요.

1000646732.english: When you open the umbrella like this, a protective shield deploys...

1000646733.english: Even tho they failed to defuse the bomb, they prevented the explosion from leaking out.
1000646733.korean: 폭탄 해체를 실패하더라도 폭발이 새어나가는 걸 막아줬어요.

1000646734.english: Then what about you? You're in danger too.

1000646735.english: I'm fine. Because it's the duty of nobles to protect and guide the people.
1000646735.korean: 저는 괜찮아요. 사람들을 지키고 이끌어주는 게 귀족의 의무니까요.

1000646737.english: Anyway, do you like black tea?

1000646738.english: Black tea? I drink it sometimes. With the donut.
1000646738.korean: 홍차? 가끔 마시기는 하지. 도넛이랑 같이.

1000646739.english: It's too bitter for my taste, but does Ellie like black tea?
1000646739.korean: 내 입에는 써서 별로, 엘리는 홍차를 좋아해?

1000646741.english: There are so many types of black tea, but Earl Gray is my favorite!
1000646741.korean: 홍차의 종류는 정~말 많지만, 그중에서 얼그레이를 가장 좋아해요!

1000646742.english: Haha. You're such a child when you're like this.

1000646744.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I just couldn't help myself...

1000646746.english: Okay, you can have more chocolate.

1000646749.english: ... No, I was just thinking about something else for a moment.

1000646751.english: It's a shame, but there's nothing particularly special about it.

1000646752.english: I think we'll need to secure a data storage room after all.
1000646752.korean: 아무래도 자료 저장실을 확보해야 할 것 같습니다.

1000646753.english: Then it's time to work. Shall we breach?

1000646755.english: - The city occupation is progressing, and securing supplies is also going smoothly...
1000646755.korean: - 도시 점령은 진행 중이고, 물자 확보도 원활하고...

1000646756.english: - While organizing my tasks, I received a call from HongRyeon, who had entered the secret base.
1000646756.korean: - 할 일을 정리하던 중, 비밀 기지로 진입한 홍련에게서 연락이 왔다.

1000646757.english: - I've secured the hidden data storage room and received a report that the data investigation personnel will be relieved, so I told them to bring Ellie as well.
1000646757.korean: - 숨겨진 자료 저장실을 확보했고, 자료 조사 인원과 교대하겠다는 보고에 나는 엘리도 데려와달라고 전했다.

1000646759.english: Hello. Let me formally introduce myself.

1000646760.english: My name is Ellie Quickhand, and I look forward to working with you, Commander.
1000646760.korean: 제 이름은 엘리 퀵핸드, 앞으로 잘 부탁드려요, 사령관님.

1000646761.english: - Ellie curtsied to me, holding her skirt and bending her knees slightly.
1000646761.korean: - 엘리는 치마폭을 잡고 무릎을 살짝 굽히며 내게 인사했다.

1000646762.english: - Even tho they look to be around the same age, they're the complete opposite of the rambunctious LRL and Alvis, being very polite...
1000646762.korean: - 비슷한 또래로 보이는데도 천방지축인 LRL이나 알비스랑은 정반대로 예의가 바른걸...

1000646763.english: Please let me know anytime if you need anything.

1000646767.english: I commend your courage in standing before me. Tell the princess of the True Ancestors your true name!
1000646767.korean: 이 몸의 앞에 선 그 용기를 높이 사마. 진조의 프린세스에게 네 진명을 고하거라!

1000646768.english: It's rude to ask someone's name without revealing your own.
1000646768.korean: 본인의 이름을 밝히지 않고 남의 이름을 묻는 건 무례한 행동이랍니다.

1000646771.english: I am the Princess of the True Ancestors.

1000646774.english: It's LRL. Let's be friends from now on.

1000646776.english: ...Heh heh. You've discovered this body's true name. Not bad.

1000646777.english: I hereby appoint you as the pitch-black shield that protects the true ancestor!
1000646777.korean: 특별히 너를 진조를 수호하는 칠흑의 방패로 임명하노라!

1000646778.english: Shield of pitch black, never leave my side for a moment!
1000646778.korean: 칠흑의 방패여, 한시도 짐의 곁을 떠나지 말지어다!

1000646779.english: Yes, Princess of the True Ancestors.

1000646780.english: That's great! At this level, I should definitely be able to contend with the Watchdog of the Report...!
1000646780.korean: 아주 좋다! 이정도면 분명 보고의 파수꾼과도 대적할 수 있을터...!

1000646782.english: Now, my kin! Today is the day we defeat them!

1000646783.english: The ruthless gatekeeper blocking our path...!

1000646784.english: - Overjoyed, LRL and Alvis ran over to Andvari, who was checking the food supply from afar.
1000646784.korean: - 잔뜩 신이난 LRL과 알비스는 멀리서 식자재 재고를 파악 중인 안드바리에게 달려갔다.

1000646786.english: Could I also go with Ms. LRL and Ms. Alvis...?
1000646786.korean: 저도 LRL양과 알비스양이랑 같이 가도 될까요...?

1000646788.english: Unlike the mischievous ones, Andvari and Ellie, who had bowed to each other, began to talk about something. And then...
1000646788.korean: - 개구쟁이들과는 달리 서로 꾸벅 인사한 안드바리와 엘리는 무언가 이야기를 나누기 시작했다. 그리고는...

1000646789.english: - When Ellie started scolding them, LRL, who had been momentarily dejected, quickly perked up as usual, and soon LRL, Alvis, Ellie, and even Andvari started running around the correction grounds together.
1000646789.korean: - 엘리가 나무라기 시작하자 잠시 풀이 죽었던 LRL은 평소처럼 순식간에 부활했고, LRL, 알비스, 엘리는 물론 곧 안드바리까지 함께 교정을 뛰어다니기 시작했다.

1000646790.english: - As I watched the children like that, I realized that HongRyeon, who was beside me, was also staring blankly at the children.
1000646790.korean: - 그렇게 아이들의 모습을 바라보다, 곁에 있던 홍련도 멍하니 아이들을 보고 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000646792.english: You were staring blankly at Ellie earlier too... Are you really okay?
1000646792.korean: 아까도 엘리를 보면서 멍하니 계시던데... 정말 괜찮으세요?

1000646793.english: ... Every time I see Ellie, I keep thinking about boots.

1000646794.english: Yes. If JangHwa had been loved, wouldn't she have been able to smile so brightly like that...?
1000646794.korean: 네. 장화가 사랑받았다면, 저렇게 해맑게 웃을 수 있지는 않았을까…

1000646795.english: If we had met a little earlier, perhaps we could have changed things...
1000646795.korean: 좀 더 빨리 만났다면, 바꿀 수 있지는 않았을까...

1000646797.english: - HongRyeon said that and lowered her head.

1000646799.english: Well, your mom was incredibly serious and cold back then.
1000646799.korean: 음, 그때의 엄마는 엄청 진지하고 냉정했지.

1000646800.english: Pinto was so tense he was frozen stiff.

1000646801.english: It was just a little awkward.

1000646805.english: ... I was very lacking back then.

1000646807.english: You worked hard on this operation too. I will take a 10-minute break and then sortie again immediately.
1000646807.korean: 이번 작전도 수고 많았어요. 10분간 휴식한 뒤 바로 다시 출격하겠습니다.

1000646809.english: ... I know how you usually address me, but please be clear about public and private matters.
1000646809.korean: ...평소에 여러분들이 저를 어떻게 부르는지는 알고 있습니다만, 공과 사는 확실히 구분해주세요.

1000646811.english: Operations Officer, Draco is just trying to be friendly, so-
1000646811.korean: 작전관님, 드라코도 친해지고 싶어서 그러는 거니까-

1000646812.english: I understand your feelings, but personal emotions could jeopardize the operation.
1000646812.korean: 그 마음은 이해하지만, 사사로운 감정 때문에 작전을 그르칠 수도 있습니다.

1000646816.english: Then please take a break. I will go and report to the commander.
1000646816.korean: 그럼 휴식하도록 하세요. 저는 사령관님께 보고드리러 다녀오겠습니다.

1000646817.english: I thought calling her "Mom" might change things, but...

1000646818.english: How can I become friends with them?

1000646819.english: Let's not rush things too much. Someday, Mom will understand how we feel too.
1000646819.korean: 너무 급하게 생각하지 말자. 언젠가 엄마도 우리 마음을 알아줄거야.

1000646820.english: For now, let's prepare for the next operation. Mom will be here soon.
1000646820.korean: 지금은 일단 다음 작전 준비하자. 엄마 곧 오실거야.

1000646821.english: Ugh, I want to take a shower... It feels sticky...

1000646824.english: Oh, it's nothing. I think there's something wrong with the equipment...
1000646824.korean: 으응, 별거 아냐. 장비가 좀 이상한 것 같아서...

1000646825.english: Just in case, why don't you get it checked? I'll tell my mom.
1000646825.korean: 혹시 모르니까 점검 받아보는 게 어때? 엄마한테는 내가 말할게.

1000646827.english: When this happens, if you just tap it like this... Heh, look. Does it work properly?
1000646827.korean: 이럴땐 이렇게 툭툭 쳐주면... 헷, 봐봐. 제대로 작동하지?

1000646829.english: Go get it properly serviced quickly.

1000646832.english: Then let's begin the mission briefing.

1000646833.english: The target location is here. Moving into search formation. We're detecting Metal Parasite signals all around us, so please be prepared to use your weapons at any time.
1000646833.korean: 목표 지점은 이곳. 수색 대형으로 이동합니다. 주변 곳곳에서 철충 신호가 감지되니, 언제든 무장을 사용할 수 있게 준비해두세요.

1000646834.english: If you encounter Metal Parasite, hold them off as usual until support arrives, then join in and annihilate them.
1000646834.korean: 철충과 조우할 경우, 평소처럼 지원 부대가 도착할 때까지 견제한 뒤 합세해 섬멸합니다.

1000646835.english: Do you have any other questions?

1000646837.english: Then, we will depart as soon as the order to commence the operation is given by the commander.
1000646837.korean: 그럼 사령관님께 작전 개시 명령이 내려오는대로 출발하겠습니다.

1000646838.english: ... I'm sorry I had to send you out right away, even tho you didn't get much rest.

1000646839.english: Since everyone is busy, let's hang in there a little longer.
1000646839.korean: 다들 바쁜 상황이니까, 조금만 더 힘내죠.

1000646840.english: Pinto, did you get it serviced?

1000646841.english: Fortune wasn't there. So, I've just taken temporary measures for now. We should be fine until this operation.
1000646841.korean: 포츈 님이 안계시더라구. 그래서 일단 임시 조치만 취해놨어. 이번 작전까지는 문제 없을 거야.

1000646843.english: Our main mission is to hinder them anyway. If it really doesn't work out, I'll just back down.
1000646843.korean: 어차피 우리 주 임무는 견제잖아. 정 안되면 물러나지 뭐.

1000646844.english: The commander has ordered the operation to begin. It moves.

1000646846.english: Then I'll report in once I arrive at the reconnaissance point.

1000646850.english: ... Will I be able to become friends with the operations officer?

1000646851.english: As I said earlier, we just have to wait.

1000646853.english: ... But when did we become so close?

1000646854.english: We were all awkward at first too, weren't we?

1000646855.english: That's how it was at first. Surely we also lived without caring about the other team members...
1000646855.korean: 처음에는 그랬었지. 분명 우리도 다른 팀원은 신경 안 쓰고 살았는데...

1000646856.english: But after thinking about it for a bit, I understood. The image of the old Mongoose team remained with us.
1000646856.korean: 그런데 조금 생각해보니 알겠더라. 옛날 몽구스 팀의 모습이 우리에게 남아있었어.

1000646858.english: To be precise, it's a mindset. The original Mongoose team dealt with terrorists... Because it wouldn't have been strange if he had died during any operation, at any time.
1000646858.korean: 정확하게 말하면 마음가짐이지. 원래 몽구스 팀은 테러리스트를 상대했고... 언제 어떤 작전 중에 죽어도 이상하지 않았으니까.

1000646859.english: ...... It's sad when someone close to you dies, isn't it?

1000646861.english: You know what? Back then, I even told the commander about wanting to be friends with you guys.
1000646861.korean: 그거 알아? 예전에 나, 너희랑 친해지고 싶어서 이 얘기 사령관한테도 했었어.

1000646862.english: Really? What did the commander say?

1000646865.english: He just smiled slightly and then gave me snacks, drinks, and various other things to share with you guys.
1000646865.korean: 그냥 살짝 웃더니, 너희랑 먹으라고 과자랑 음료수랑 이것저것 주더라.

1000646867.english: At that time, that... While eating snacks, Bulgasari said the commander was acting strange, didn't he?
1000646867.korean: 그때 그... 과자 먹으면서 불가사리가 사령관 이상하다고 했잖아.

1000646871.english: ... But you like it now, right?

1000646872.english: After a little while, I understood what that meant. Since we met the commander, no one has been sacrificed.
1000646872.korean: 조금 지나니까 그게 무슨 뜻이었는지 알겠더라구. 사령관을 만난 뒤로는 아무도 희생당하지 않았으니까.

1000646873.english: Oh, I realized then that meant I didn't have to worry about that and could become friends with you guys.
1000646873.korean: 아, 그때 그건 걱정 말고 너희랑 친해져도 된다는 뜻이구나, 하고 깨달았어.

1000646874.english: Everyone, we've detected a swarm of Metal Parasite approaching Pinto. Prepare for engagement.
1000646874.korean: 여러분, 핀토가 접근중인 철충 무리를 발견했습니다. 교전을 준비해주세요.

1000646875.english: Miho, can you see it with your naked eye?

1000646876.english: Ugh, it never just passes quietly, does it?

1000646877.english: Draco, take your seat - why are you laughing like that?
1000646877.korean: 드라코, 자리 잡- 왜 그렇게 웃고 있어?

1000646879.english: Just because. I'm glad I became friends with you guys.

1000646882.english: Enemy reinforcements at 2 o'clock, distance 500, 8 units!

1000646883.english: They're still coming from the front!

1000646884.english: It was definitely small-scale, but where are they still coming from?
1000646884.korean: 분명 소규모였는데, 어디서 계속 나오는 거야?

1000646885.english: It seems like it was lurking nearby.

1000646886.english: Mongoose Team. Maintain formation and retreat. It doesn't look like we can hold them off until the support units arrive.
1000646886.korean: 몽구스 팀. 대형을 유지하고 물러납니다. 지원 부대가 올 때까지 붙잡아두기는 어려워보여요.

1000646889.english: It's okay. It's something I do all the time, so it's nothing.

1000646890.english: Come on, this way, this way!

1000646891.english: Hmph, attacks like that won't hit me!

1000646892.english: ... Let's retreat while we have the chance.

1000646893.english: Miho, retreat quickly to the rendezvous point as well.

1000646895.english: Miho will arrive at the rendezvous point soon. Pinto, please come back too.
1000646895.korean: 미호가 곧 합류 지점에 도착합니다. 핀토도 복귀하세요.

1000646899.english: Ugh... One of the engine fans shut down, causing it to crash.
1000646899.korean: 윽... 기동 팬 하나가 꺼져서 추락했어요.

1000646900.english: Returning on foot - Tch, those Metal Parasites...!

1000646901.english: Bulgasari, Draco! Immediately move to the location where Pinto crashed and rescue him!
1000646901.korean: 불가사리, 드라코! 즉시 핀토가 추락한 위치로 이동해서 구출하세요!

1000646904.english: Sniper support will be available in 30 seconds!

1000646909.english: Draco! Pinto, I'll carry you, so hold off the Iron Blood!
1000646909.korean: 드라코! 핀토는 내가 업을테니까 철충을 막아줘!

1000646911.english: Just hold on a little longer! Support units are approaching!
1000646911.korean: 조금만 더 버텨! 지원 부대가 접근중이야!

1000646912.english: Move Bulgasari and Pinto behind the green container at the 7 o'clock position. We will establish a temporary defensive line there.
1000646912.korean: 불가사리, 핀토를 7시 방향 녹색 컨테이너 뒤로 옮기세요. 그곳에 임시 방어선을 구축합니다.

1000646913.english: Miho will handle the Metal Parasite approaching from the north, and I will take the east.
1000646913.korean: 미호가 북쪽에서 접근하는 철충을, 제가 동쪽을 맡습니다.

1000646918.english: Um... Since you didn't say anything, Draco sent me to bring Miho...
1000646918.korean: 저... 따로 말씀이 없으셔서 드라코는 미호 데리고 오라고 보냈는데...

1000646922.english: I thought there wouldn't be any problems... I almost ruined the operation because of... huh?
1000646922.korean: 저는 별 문제 없을 줄 알고... 저 때문에 작전을 망칠 뻔- 어...?

1000646923.english: That's a relief... I'm so relieved you're safe...

1000646925.english: If something had happened to Pinto... I...
1000646925.korean: 만약 핀토에게 무슨 일이 생겼으면... 저는...

1000646926.english: Operations Officer... I, I can't breathe...

1000646928.english: I'm, I'm sorry. Did I make you feel uncomfortable by acting friendly for no reason...?
1000646928.korean: 미, 미안해요. 괜히 친한 척해서 기분 나빴죠...?

1000646929.english: No, that's not what I meant...

1000646932.english: Still, you've opened up a little bit since then. We even ate tteokbokki together, so...
1000646932.korean: 그래도 그때 이후로 조금은 마음을 열어주셨지. 다같이 떡볶이를 먹기도 했으니까~

1000646933.english: That's right. We even call her Mom, that's how much.

1000646935.english: ... How do you think of us, the operations officer?

1000646936.english: We think of the operations officer as our mother.

1000646937.english: I'm a member of the Mongoose team, a colleague I work with...
1000646937.korean: 몽구스 팀의 일원이고, 함께 일하는 동료...

1000646939.english: Hoo hoo. It's all thanks to you.

1000646940.english: But I'm worried about whether I can convince JangHwa...
1000646940.korean: 하지만 장화를 설득할 수 있을지 걱정되네요...

1000646941.english: Just like I've changed, maybe the boots can change too?
1000646941.korean: 제가 변한 것처럼 장화도 바뀔 수 있겠죠?

1000646943.english: But how do I find the boots?

1000646944.english: Hmm... I can't even guess where they might be.
1000646944.korean: 음... 어디에 있을지 예상이 되질 않네.

1000646945.english: - Since we've sent troops to secure the city, that should help with finding the boots.
1000646945.korean: - 도시를 확보하기 위해 병력을 보낸 상태니까, 장화를 찾는 데 도움이 되겠지.

1000646946.english: Then, I should just go there.

1000646947.english: ... No. If you don't mind, please leave it to us.

1000646948.english: - HongRyeon looked at me with a confident expression.
1000646948.korean: - 홍련은 확신에 찬 표정으로 나를 바라봤다.

1000646951.english: There's a Ferrofluid signal nearby. Let's go around, as we might be ambushed by the boots during the battle.
1000646951.korean: 인근에 철충 신호입니다. 전투중에 장화에게 기습당할 수 있으니 우회하도록 하죠.

1000646952.english: It's refreshing to be moving together like this during an operation, isn't it?

1000646953.english: As usual, if Miho is separated from us, the boots will definitely target her.
1000646953.korean: 평소처럼 미호가 저희와 떨어져 있으면 분명 장화가 노릴테니까요.

1000646954.english: Pinto, please continue to maintain a high altitude.

1000646955.english: Yes. It's maintaining a higher altitude than the surrounding buildings.
1000646955.korean: 네. 주변 빌딩보다 높은 고도를 유지 중이에요.

1000646956.english: I'm starting to detect a lot of electronic signals. IED, right?
1000646956.korean: 슬슬 전자 신호가 많이 감지되네요. IED겠죠?

1000646957.english: Did they mark the area or something?

1000646958.english: According to the records, JangHwa had already planted a large number of explosives and booby traps in the operation area in advance.
1000646958.korean: 기록에 따르면 장화는 미리 작전 지역에 폭발물과 부비 트랩을 잔뜩 설치해뒀다고 해요.

1000646959.english: That means JangHwa has been staying around here for a long time.
1000646959.korean: 그만큼 장화가 이 근방에 머문지 오래되었다는 거겠죠.

1000646960.english: Miho, don't get ahead of yourself.

1000646961.english: Okay, okay~ We'll hide behind Draco's shield - Draco!
1000646961.korean: 알았어, 알았어~ 우리 드라코 방패 뒤에 꼭꼭 숨어있을- 드라코!

1000646967.english: Why can you block my attacks so many times? Until now, once was enough, but...
1000646967.korean: 왜 몇 번씩이나 내 공격을 막을 수 있는 거지? 이전까지는 한 번이면 충분했는데...

1000646968.english: Well, it doesn't matter. If one time isn't enough, I'll just beat them until they fall.
1000646968.korean: 뭐, 상관없어, 한 번으로 안 되면 쓰러질 때까지 패주면 되니까.

1000646970.english: Boots. I came to talk to you.
1000646970.korean: 장화. 저는 당신과 이야기를 하러 왔어요.

1000646971.english: Conversation, huh... That's a good idea!

1000646973.english: Take it well. This is just how I talk...!

1000646975.english: Ahaha. It's a masterpiece. Are you out of your mind?
1000646975.korean: 아하핫. 걸작이네. 너 머리가 어떻게 된 거 아니야?

1000646976.english: Do you think I've never experienced anything like this before?
1000646976.korean: 내가 여태까지 겪어본 적 없을 것 같아?

1000646977.english: You're just going to spout the same nonsense as the other guys anyway, so why should I listen?
1000646977.korean: 너도 결국 다른 녀석이랑 같은 이상한 소리나 늘어놓을 텐데, 내가 왜 들어야 해?

1000646978.english: Just don't say anything and die here.
1000646978.korean: 그냥 아무 말도 하지 말고 여기서 죽어.

1000646979.english: Boots, please. Even for a moment, please talk-

1000646980.english: I said no, but you keep doing it. I...

1000646981.english: I just want to kill you!

1000646984.english: You can think of it as me talking to myself, if you want...!

1000646985.english: Stop messing around and just come at me. With your friends who are messing around next to you!
1000646985.korean: 허튼짓하지 말고 그냥 덤벼. 옆에서 깔짝대는 네 친구들이랑 같이!

1000646986.english: When I first met you, I was very surprised. Why are they attacking us, and why do they look like me...?
1000646986.korean: 처음 당신을 만났을 때는 많이 놀랐어요. 우리를 공격하는 이유는 무엇인지, 그리고 왜 저와 닮았는지...!

1000646987.english: So I did some research on you.

1000646988.english: Born into the power struggle of the Leoboros family... They would have just been used as tools and taken advantage of.
1000646988.korean: 리오보로스 가문의 권력 다툼에서 태어나서... 그저 도구로써 사용되고, 이용당하기만 했겠죠.

1000646990.english: I can't just leave you like this.
1000646990.korean: 당신을 이대로 내버려 둘 수는 없어요.

1000646991.english: Because of me, it's like this...

1000646992.english: Yes, it's all because of you...!

1000646996.english: Pinto, what's the situation around you?

1000646997.english: Hearing the commotion, nearby Metal Parasite Beasts are swarming in. It's too fast.
1000646997.korean: 소란을 듣고 근처 철충들이 몰려오고 있어요. 너무 빨라요.

1000646998.english: I'll join you as soon as possible.

1000647000.english: So what? Whether it's the Metal Parasites or you guys, all we have to do is blow them all up, right?
1000647000.korean: 그래서 어쩌라고? 철충이든 너희든 전부 터트려버리면 되는 거잖아?

1000647001.english: I'm starting to get annoyed, so now die!

1000647002.english: I won't let it go that way!

1000647004.english: Mongoose team, you need to hold out until Pinto arrives.
1000647004.korean: 몽구스 팀, 핀토가 올 때까지 버텨야해요.

1000647006.english: Okay. Let's see you hold out...!

1000647010.english: Tch. All the traps I prepared so carefully are useless now because of the Metal Parasite.
1000647010.korean: 쳇. 기껏 준비한 함정들이 철충 때문에 전부 쓸모없어졌잖아.

1000647011.english: I was looking forward to seeing something interesting, but it's a shame I missed it.
1000647011.korean: 재밌는 걸 볼 수 있었는데 아쉽게 됐어.

1000647012.english: Miho! Would it be possible to provide covering fire?

1000647013.english: There's an obstacle in the line of sight! I'll move!

1000647014.english: Okay, I understand. I'll try to hold on a little longer.

1000647015.english: Tsk. It would have been nice if it had turned into a chaotic battle like before...

1000647016.english: You didn't even think that far ahead? I already know what you guys are up to.
1000647016.korean: 그 정도도 생각 못 했을까 봐? 네놈들이 무슨 짓을 하는 지도 이미 알고 있어.

1000647017.english: The fact that they took over the UOU Academy, and that there are EOD personnel...
1000647017.korean: UOU 학원을 점령한 것도, EOD 요원이 있다는 것도...

1000647018.english: I can figure it all out.

1000647020.english: Do you think I'm going to tell you that?

1000647021.english: If you really want, I'll let you know when your last breath is.
1000647021.korean: 정 원한다면, 네 숨통이 끊어질 때 알려줄게.

1000647022.english: The Metal Parasite are still swarming in. Stop fighting now-
1000647022.korean: 철충이 계속 몰려들고 있어요. 이만 싸움을 멈추고-

1000647023.english: It doesn't matter, I can just blow up the Metal Parasite and all of you.
1000647023.korean: 상관없어, 나는 철충도 너희도 전부 터트려버리면 되니까.

1000647024.english: I can't do it that way!

1000647026.english: Can I really hold out? Do you want to end up face down on the floor again like last time?
1000647026.korean: 과연 버틸 수 있을까? 저번처럼 바닥에 처박혀볼래?

1000647028.english: You're just a loudmouth, you idiot. If you're so confident, try holding your ground.
1000647028.korean: 멍청한 게 입만 살아서, 자신 있으면 어디 버텨봐.

1000647029.english: The results are obvious, but ahahaha.

1000647030.english: I've arrived! I'll take care of the Metal Parasite blocking my view first!

1000647031.english: Are you here already, and it's boring?

1000647032.english: Go play with those guys, I'm leaving.
1000647032.korean: 어디 그 녀석들하고 잘 놀아봐, 난 갈 테니까.

1000647033.english: I won't let you get away!

1000647034.english: Get out of the way! Ugh!

1000647035.english: Where do you think you're going? You're not getting past me.

1000647036.english: Draco, just hold on a little longer! I'll stick with you.
1000647036.korean: 드라코 조금만 더 버텨! 내가 붙을 테니까.

1000647039.english: You guys who would normally be knocked flat after a few attacks, don't even think about crawling back up.
1000647039.korean: 평소 같았으면 공격 몇 번에 나자빠질 것들이 기어오르지 마.

1000647041.english: Bulgasari, I'll support you, so go for it!

1000647042.english: Okay, be careful, there are still Metal Parasite Beasts around.
1000647042.korean: 알았어, 아직 주변에 철충이 있으니 조심해.

1000647043.english: Stop bothering me and get out of here right now!

1000647045.english: So, you're going to interfere until the very end, are you? Kill you first.
1000647045.korean: 그래 끝까지 방해겠다는 거지? 너부터 죽여-

1000647047.english: Next time, I'll get it right!

1000647049.english: The wound needs to be treated. Just give up and surrender.
1000647049.korean: 상처를 치료해야 합니다. 그만 포기하고 투항하세요.

1000647050.english: This is nothing. I'll never give up until I've killed all of you.
1000647050.korean: 이 정도는 별거 아냐, 너희를 모두 죽일 때까지는 절대 포기 안 해.

1000647051.english: ... But I can't get caught here, I'll be going now.
1000647051.korean: ...하지만 여기서 잡힐 수는 없지, 이만 가보겠어.

1000647053.english: Let's catch up before we start the maintenance.

1000647056.english: Damn it, the bug's broken. I made such a mistake...
1000647056.korean: 젠장, 도청 장치가 고장 났잖아. 내가 이런 실수를...

1000647057.english: Normally, there would be plenty of time to handle it, but there are just too many variables.
1000647057.korean: 원래대로라면 처리하고도 남을 시간인데 변수가 너무 많아.

1000647058.english: Compared to the previous guys, their equipment and troop levels are different, and their attitude is also strange.
1000647058.korean: 이전 녀석들과 비교해서 장비와 병력 수준이 달라, 그 녀석들 태도도 이상하고.

1000647059.english: What are you talking about, guilt or whatever? What were you thinking when you said that?
1000647059.korean: 죄책감이니 뭐니, 무슨 생각으로 그런 말을 하는 거야?

1000647060.english: There are so many things I don't understand.
1000647060.korean: 이해할 수 없는 게 너무 많아.

1000647061.english: And a feeling I'm experiencing for the first time...
